questionHtml: Outline how the carbon dioxide could be removed from the water used to irrigate the plant.
markschemeHtml:
a. boiling (and cooling) the water;

b. expose the water to a vacuum;

Allow distillation of water.

meta.title: Outline how the carbon dioxide could be removed from the water used to irrigate the plant.
breadcrumbLabels: C1.3.7. Techniques for varying concentrations of carbon dioxide, light intensity or temperature experimentally to investigate the effects of limiting factors on the rate of photosynthesis
